# Bit Manipulation → Bit Extract

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Bit Manipulation → Bit Extract

Bit Extract

Instruction Type and Width        Instruction description
                                  Performs extraction of bits according to a given width and offset
                                  from a source into a destination. The width represents the
Vector Bit Extract                number of bits to be extracted from the source; the offset
                                  represents the number of bits from the beginning of the source.
                                  The source is 32-bit wide. The destination is 32-bit wide.
